claims: The skill description includes integration with external LLM services (e.g., Anthropic Claude) that upload clinical text to third-party servers, which contradicts the stated privacy claim of "No PHI stored or transmitted" in the Privacy & Compliance section. This poses a significant privacy risk for sensitive medical data (PHI), as the skill may transmit unprotected clinical narratives externally without clear necessity or user consent, despite the primary purpose of entity extraction being achievable with local models like medspaCy.
